---
title: "Quo Vadis Computer Science? The topics of the influential papers during the period 2014–2021"
author: "Tsapatsoulis, N., Partaourides, H., Christodoulou, C., and Djouvas, C."
date: 2022-01-01
description: "IEEE International Conference on Pervasive Intelligence and Computing (PICom 2022). doi: 10.1109/DASC/PiCom/CBDCom/Cy55231.2022.9927789"
categories:
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
